chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-221 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.10196/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.10197/2025 (Return of surety) 27.11.2025 Mr.Ghulam Hussain Palari, Advocate for the applicant/surety Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G (present in Court in other matter, waives notice of listed application) ********* 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant states that that vide Order dated 11.3.20255, the applicant/accused Mujeeb-ur-Rehman was granted protective bail by this Court for a period of seven days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further states that thereafter accused surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated period where he was granted interim pre-arrest bail vide Order dated 17.3.2025, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record tendered her no objection. In view of above, listed application stand disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
